Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.reference

Class FieldReference

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.reference.VariableReference
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.reference.FieldReference
All Implemented Interfaces:
Expression, ExpressionContainer, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, Reference, MemberReference, NameReference, ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, TypeReferenceContainer, SourceElement, SVSubstitute
Direct Known Subclasses:
SchematicFieldReference
public class FieldReference extends VariableReference implements MemberReference, ReferenceSuffix, TypeReferenceContainer, ExpressionContainer

    • getFirstElement

      public SourceElement getFirstElement()
      Description copied from class: JavaSourceElement
      Finds the source element that occurs first in the source. The default implementation returns this element, which is correct for all terminal program elements, and many non terminals such as statements and prefixed operators.
      Specified by:
      getFirstElement in interface SourceElement
      Overrides:
      getFirstElement in class VariableReference
      Returns:
      the first source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
      See Also:
      • JavaSourceElement.toSource()
      • JavaSourceElement.getStartPosition()

    • getFirstElementIncludingBlocks

      public SourceElement getFirstElementIncludingBlocks()
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Finds the source element that occurs first in the source.
      Specified by:
      getFirstElementIncludingBlocks in interface SourceElement
      Overrides:
      getFirstElementIncludingBlocks in class JavaSourceElement
      Returns:
      the first source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
      See Also:
      • SourceElement.getStartPosition()
